message:
Running command: 
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
DESIGN="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

echo "=== Re-running synthesis: $(date) ==="
cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN}"

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/apps/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --last-run \
  -F Yosys.Synthesis \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>&1 &
LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $LR_PID"

sleep 25
echo ""
echo "=== Synthesis status ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CPU:"$3"%"}'
tail -15 /tmp/librelane_synth2.log
